dhis2.title: DHIS2 Integration
dhis2.subtitle: Configure the connection to your DHIS2 instance for data synchronization
dhis2.instanceUrlHelp: Full URL of the DHIS2 instance (e.g. https://dhis2.example.org)
dhis2.passwordHelp: Leave blank to keep the existing saved password
dhis2.urlUsernameRequired: Instance URL and username are required.
dhis2.urlUsernameTestRequired: Instance URL and username are required to test.
dhis2.networkError: Network error — could not reach the server.
dhis2.loadMappingsError: Could not load mappings. Save and test connection first.
dhis2.noMappings: No mappings configured. Connect to a DHIS2 instance first.
dhis2.syncFailed: Failed to trigger sync. Check connection settings.

tour.welcomeContent: This is a live demo pre-loaded with real-world vaccine supply chain data. Let's take a quick tour of the key features.
tour.overviewContent: Your command centre: KPIs, stock trends, facility coverage rates, and recent alerts — all in one view.
tour.inventoryContent: Track stock levels across all facilities. Filter by vaccine type, facility, or country. Spot shortfalls before they become crises.
tour.forecastContent: Prophet-powered 90-day demand forecasts with confidence intervals. Select any facility and vaccine to see predicted receipt, issue, and wastage curves.
tour.coldChainContent: Real-time temperature readings from cold chain sensors. Threshold breaches trigger instant alerts to prevent spoilage.
tour.coverageContent: Interactive map showing facility-level immunization coverage rates and stock status. Filter by country, vaccine type, or time period.
tour.doneContent: Explore freely — all data is pre-loaded and safe to play with. Contact us at hello@vaxaivision.com to discuss a pilot for your organization.
